Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Mother Nature and Nubs Groomers teamed up today for the perfect Red and Blue loop experience . Blue bird sky , perfect corduroy, and SO MUCH SNOW!

nubsNob.xcTrails: Grooming in progress. Trails will be very soft.
nubsNob.comments: Brace yourself for an epic day of skiing and riding at Nub's Nob. The majority of our terrain is groomed, but there is still a lot of air in the snow so expect soft conditions. For those looking for powder you will find it. Please use caution in the glades with the snow depth. Lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Please note that some services will be limited today as many employees are still digging out and unable to travel to the lodge. Grab some the wide skis and make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
